name: lib-stop-buying-ads
caption:
Stop buying ads you can't answer.

More leads is pointless if half your calls already ring out. Plug the leak first — then turn the taps up.

Free missed-call audit — link in bio. 👇

#tradesbusiness #marketing #plumber #electrician #leadgen
